name: Dwarf Defense
short_description: Dwarf Defense! An RTS Tower Defense game where you play as a dwarf trying to defend a brewery from thirsty invaders by using magical towers and spells.
detailed_description:
Dwarf Defense! An RTS Tower Defense game where you play as a dwarf trying to defend his brewery from thirsty invaders by using magical towers and spells.

  • Endless Wave mode--see how far your strategy can take you. Learn and improve to get further.
  • Build up to 63 different towers with varying abilities, strengths, and weaknesses.
  • Upgrade your builder with 21 different upgrades to damage enemies impede your enemies.
  • Professional voice acting for 16 different enemies. Hundreds of different lines of dialogue!
  • 16 different enemies each with their own unique models, animations, and voices.
  • Enjoy the glorious animations and particle effects that the Unreal Engine can produce.

  • Dwarves!


    With enough support we'll expand to have additional game modes such as line-tower-wars and tower mazing, along with taking community requests to improve and expand the game.
    EDIT: Multiplayer was added on 11/30/18! Cooperative only for now! (will expand to more modes in time).
